title: Garden Life Insect Hotel Wooden Bug House Natural Nest Shelter Box
features: Protective; Provides a shelter for insects, bees, butterflies, ladybirds and other solitary insects, safe from pest-predators
Large capacity; More than 250 holes for insects to live in
Rain protection; Designed with an overhanging metal roof to provide more space for insects to shelter underneath; this also protects it from moisture, giving it a longer life
Easy to install; Simply hang from a branch using the attached hook or nestle within shrubbery
description: Product Description Protect insects in your garden Garden Life Wooden Insect Hotel Provide a safe and sheltered place for insects to rest with this wooden insect hotel from Garden Life . It will keep them safe from pest-predators such as bats. Sturdy construction with metal roof The insect hotel is designed with lots of hollow tubes for insects to nest in , with different shapes and sizes it will cater to all small bugs. The slanted metal roof not only stops rain water collecting but also provides shelter for other insects to hang underneath. The overhanging roof is also perfectly shaped for butterflies to hang from to shelter from bad weather or predators. Each compartment is designed with different insects in mind The top chamber filled with soft wood is perfect for making earwigs feel at home ; the sections with bamboo & hollow wood are great for bees, ladybirds & other small insects ; & the thin chamber at the centre is the perfect place for lacewings or butterflies to spend time. Not only does this insect hotel offer a safe environment for insects & bugs , it also offers an educational opportunity for children by giving them an up-close view of how insects behave and allow them to observe nature. Specification Dimensions L29 x W9 x H38cm Weight 2kg Assembly required? No Material Soft wood, bamboo & metal
